신명기 18:1.content: The priests and the Levites—all the tribe of Levi—shall have no portion nor inheritance with Israel. They shall eat the offerings of Yahweh made by fire and his portion.

신명기 18:2.content: They shall have no inheritance among their brothers. Yahweh is their inheritance, as he has spoken to them.

신명기 18:3.content: This shall be the priests’ due from the people, from those who offer a sacrifice, whether it be ox or sheep, that they shall give to the priest: the shoulder, the two cheeks, and the inner parts.

신명기 18:4.content: You shall give him the first fruits of your grain, of your new wine, and of your oil, and the first of the fleece of your sheep.

신명기 18:5.content: For Yahweh your God has chosen him out of all your tribes to stand to minister in Yahweh’s name, him and his sons forever.

신명기 18:6.content: If a Levite comes from any of your gates out of all Israel where he lives, and comes with all the desire of his soul to the place which Yahweh shall choose,

신명기 18:7.content: then he shall minister in the name of Yahweh his God, as all his brothers the Levites do, who stand there before Yahweh.

신명기 18:8.content: They shall have like portions to eat, in addition to that which comes from the sale of his family possessions.

신명기 18:9.content: When you have come into the land which Yahweh your God gives you, you shall not learn to imitate the abominations of those nations.

신명기 18:10.content: There shall not be found with you anyone who makes his son or his daughter to pass through the fire, one who uses divination, one who tells fortunes, or an enchanter, or a sorcerer,

신명기 18:11.content: or a charmer, or someone who consults with a familiar spirit, or a wizard, or a necromancer.

신명기 18:12.content: For whoever does these things is an abomination to Yahweh. Because of these abominations, Yahweh your God drives them out from before you.

신명기 18:13.content: You shall be blameless with Yahweh your God.

신명기 18:14.content: For these nations that you shall dispossess listen to those who practice sorcery and to diviners; but as for you, Yahweh your God has not allowed you so to do.

신명기 18:15.content: Yahweh your God will raise up to you a prophet from among you, of your brothers, like me. You shall listen to him.

신명기 18:16.content: This is according to all that you desired of Yahweh your God in Horeb in the day of the assembly, saying, “Let me not hear again Yahweh my God’s voice, neither let me see this great fire any more, that I not die.”

신명기 18:17.content: Yahweh said to me, “They have well said that which they have spoken.

신명기 18:18.content: I will raise them up a prophet from among their brothers, like you. I will put my words in his mouth, and he shall speak to them all that I shall command him.

신명기 18:19.content: It shall happen, that whoever will not listen to my words which he shall speak in my name, I will require it of him.

신명기 18:20.content: But the prophet who speaks a word presumptuously in my name, which I have not commanded him to speak, or who speaks in the name of other gods, that same prophet shall die.”

신명기 18:21.content: You may say in your heart, “How shall we know the word which Yahweh has not spoken?”

신명기 18:22.content: When a prophet speaks in Yahweh’s name, if the thing doesn’t follow, nor happen, that is the thing which Yahweh has not spoken. The prophet has spoken it presumptuously. You shall not be afraid of him.
